heading: Boundaries
label: 546a Boundaries
notes: Amendments2014—Subsec. (b). substituted “” for “section 460–9 of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 100506 of title 54l
amendments: Amendments2014—Subsec. (b). substituted “” for “section 460–9 of this title”.Pub. L. 113–287section 100506 of title 54l

children.heading: Saint Helena Island
children.label: a Saint Helena Island
children.text: The scenic area shall comprise all of Saint Helena Island, in Lake Michigan, Michigan, and all associated rocks, pinnacles, islands, and islets within one-eighth mile of the shore of Saint Helena Island.

children.heading: Boundaries of Hiawatha National Forest extended
children.label: b Boundaries of Hiawatha National Forest extended
children.text: Upon establishment of the scenic area, the boundaries of the Hiawatha National Forest shall be extended to include all of the lands within the scenic area. All such extended boundaries shall be deemed boundaries in existence as of , for the purposes of .January 1, 1965section 100506 of title 54

children.heading: Payments to local governments
children.label: c Payments to local governments
children.text: Solely for purposes of payments to local governments pursuant to , lands acquired by the United States under sections 546 to 546a–5 of this title shall be treated as entitlement lands.section 6902 of title 31
